name: Linkup
description: Production-grade web search API for AI — sourced, cited answers with full-text snippets from trusted sources. REST API, Python/Node SDKs, and MCP server for agent workflows.

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Search the web and return sourced, cited results with full-text snippets tuned for LLM consumption.

skills.name: Deep Research
skills.description: Run in-depth research queries that synthesize comprehensive answers from multiple trusted sources with citations.

skills.name: URL Fetch
skills.description: Retrieve and extract clean text content from any web page URL for ingestion into agent context windows.
